summary: Excellent audience tape that captures a lively vocal switch between Jerry and Bob, though the performance itself gets only modest praise.
review: The recording is praised as one of the best audience tapes available, offering clear sound despite its crowd source. Reviewers note a playful interchange where Jerry and Bob trade verses on a song with the lyric “headlight, cool Colorado rain,” but no other standout moments are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: Recording quality is rated excellent by reviewers, while musical performance receives only a modest comment, resulting in an overall mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as one of the best audience recordings; clear balance with minimal muffling despite crowd ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; only a brief note about vocal swapping between Jerry and Bob.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Engages in verse‑switching with Bob during the song featuring the lyric “headlight, cool Colorado rain.”
band_member_comments.Bob: Shares verses with Jerry on the same song, highlighting vocal interplay.
